pi_items.source: Task description and metadata - synthetic test user name created for this task scenario
Task description and metadata - synthetic email following GardenWorld domain pattern. gardenworld.com is not a registered real domain; it matches iDempiere sample data conventions
iDempiere GardenWorld documentation confirms 'GardenWorld Admin' is a real standard role in GardenWorld sample data (https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/Login_Help)
iDempiere standard seed data - GardenWorld is the default demonstration client with ID 11 in all iDempiere installations (confirmed in task_utils.sh comment and iDempiere documentation)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a synthetic test user 'Emily Clark' in iDempiere's GardenWorld demonstration environment (client_id 11). All metadata values are verified: 'GardenWorld Admin' is a real standard role in iDempiere's GardenWorld seed data, and client_id 11 is the canonical GardenWorld client in standard iDempiere installations. The email 'emily.clark@gardenworld.com' and user name 'Emily Clark' are synthetic test values created for this demonstration task, following standard sample data naming conventions. The underlying iDempiere ERP system and GardenWorld database structure are real, but the specific user being created is a fictional demonstration account.
